user.title: cTrader App Credentials
user.description:
Register your app at https://openapi.ctrader.com and get Spotware approval first.

Make sure the **Redirect URI** below is added to your cTrader app settings.

data.redirect_uri: Redirect URI (add this exact URL to your cTrader app)

auth.title: Open cTrader Authorization
auth.description:
Click **Open cTrader** below to log in with your cTID and allow access.

After approving, you'll be redirected to your redirect URI with a `code=` parameter in the URL. Copy that code and click **Submit** to continue.

auth_code.title: Enter Authorization Code
auth_code.description:
Paste the `code` value from the redirect URL.

Example: if redirected to `https://yoursite.com/callback?code=ABC123`, paste `ABC123`.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your credentials and try again.
error.token_exchange_failed: Could not exchange the code for tokens. Make sure the code hasn't expired (valid ~1 minute) and the redirect URI matches exactly.

abort.already_configured: This cTrader account is already configured.
